title: berberis × durobrivensis
intro: Berberis × durobrivensis is a hybrid plant species, a cross between Berberis harrisoniana and Berberis vulgaris, commonly known as the 'Durobrivensis' or 'English Barberry'. This shrub is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, roots, and stems, which contain alkaloids with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Berberis × durobrivensis include its ability to support liver health, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of various infections, such as urinary tract infections and diarrhea. Berberis × durobrivensis is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, and is used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
